scripts.dev:
echo 'Run in separate terminals:
  npm run pb:dev
  npm run web:dev
Mailpit UI: http://localhost:8025'
scripts.pb:kill: pkill -f 'docker compose watch' || true; docker compose down
scripts.pb:seed-admins: PB_ADMIN_EMAIL=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserEmail 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email') PB_ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserPassword 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password') node backend/pb_seed/seed_admins.js
scripts.pb:seed-districts: PB_ADMIN_EMAIL=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserEmail 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email') PB_ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserPassword 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password') node backend/pb_seed/seed_districts.js
scripts.pb:seed-schools: PB_ADMIN_EMAIL=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserEmail 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email') PB_ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserPassword 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password') node backend/pb_seed/seed_schools.js
scripts.pb:credentials: mkdir -p .pocketbase && op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email' > .pocketbase/adminUserEmail && op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password' > .pocketbase/adminUserPassword && echo 'Credentials saved to .pocketbase/'
scripts.pb:seed-test-admin: set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && docker compose exec pocketbase pocketbase superuser upsert "$PB_ADMIN_EMAIL" "$PB_ADMIN_PASSWORD" --dir=/pb/pb_data
scripts.pb:test:reset: npm run pb:test:down && npm run pb:test:up
scripts.test:hooks: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && npm run --prefix web test:hooks
scripts.test:schema: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && npm run --prefix web test:schema
